# Utilities for developing R code

This [R](https://CRAN.R-project.org) package provides helper functions I
found useful when developing R code - perhaps you will too! The released
package version can be installed via:

``` r
install.packages("oeli")
```

The following shows some demos. Click the headings for references on all
available helpers in each category.

### [Data](https://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/index.html#data)

The `hermann` data contains historical information on editions of the
[Hermannslauf](https://de.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hermannslauf), including
the date, temperature, and winning times for men and women:

``` r
hermann
#> # A tibble: 54 × 8
#>    edition  year date        temp winner_men        seconds_men winner_women  
#>      <dbl> <dbl> <date>     <dbl> <chr>                   <dbl> <chr>         
#>  1       1  1972 1972-04-16    NA Helmut Bode              6686 Lydia Günnewig
#>  2       2  1973 1973-04-29    14 Helmut Bode              6795 Irmhild Holste
#>  3       3  1974 1974-04-28    14 Achim Stober             6942 Liane Winter  
#>  4       4  1975 1975-04-27    11 Klaus-Dieter Holz        6720 Christine Ross
#>  5       5  1976 1976-04-25    11 Heribert Bulk            6453 Liane Winter  
#>  6       6  1977 1977-04-24     9 Jim Hodey                6503 Liane Winter  
#>  7       7  1978 1978-04-30    16 Michael Heine            6856 Liane Winter  
#>  8       8  1979 1979-04-29     7 Billy Cain               6587 Liane Winter  
#>  9       9  1980 1980-04-27     9 Dieter Lippe             6706 Liane Winter  
#> 10      10  1981 1981-04-26    16 Helmut Schmidt           6735 Rotraud Zinner
#> # ℹ 44 more rows
#> # ℹ 1 more variable: seconds_women <dbl>
```

### [Distributions](https://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/index.html#distribution)

The package has density and sampling functions for some distributions
not included in base R, like the Dirichlet:

``` r
ddirichlet(x = c(0.2, 0.3, 0.5), concentration = 1:3)
#> [1] 4.5
rdirichlet(concentration = 1:3)
#> [1] 0.01795087 0.41315984 0.56888929
```

Or the mixture of Gaussian distributions:

``` r
x <- c(0, 0)
mean <- matrix(c(1, 1, -1, -1), ncol = 2) # means in columns
Sigma <- matrix(c(diag(2), 0.1 * diag(2)), ncol = 2) # vectorized covariances in columns
proportions <- c(0.7, 0.3)
dmixnorm(x = x, mean = mean, Sigma = Sigma, proportions = proportions)
#> [1] 0.04100656
pmixnorm(x = x, mean = mean, Sigma = Sigma, proportions = proportions)
#> [1] 0.3171506
rmixnorm(n = 1000, mean = mean, Sigma = Sigma, proportions = proportions) |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  ggplot2::ggplot() + ggplot2::geom_point(ggplot2::aes(x = V1, y = V2))
```

![](reference/figures/README-mixnorm-1.png)

### [Function helpers](https://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/index.html#functional)

Retrieving default arguments of a `function`:

``` r
f <- function(a, b = 1, c = "", ...) { }
function_defaults(f)
#> $b
#> [1] 1
#> 
#> $c
#> [1] ""
```

### [Indexing helpers](https://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/index.html#indexing)

Create all possible permutations of vector elements:

``` r
permutations(LETTERS[1:3])
#> [[1]]
#> [1] "A" "B" "C"
#> 
#> [[2]]
#> [1] "A" "C" "B"
#> 
#> [[3]]
#> [1] "B" "A" "C"
#> 
#> [[4]]
#> [1] "B" "C" "A"
#> 
#> [[5]]
#> [1] "C" "A" "B"
#> 
#> [[6]]
#> [1] "C" "B" "A"
```

### [Package helpers](https://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/index.html#packaging)

Quickly have a basic logo for your new package:

``` r
logo <- package_logo("my_package", brackets = TRUE)
print(logo)
```

![](reference/figures/README-package_logo-1.png)

How to print a `matrix` without filling up the entire console?

``` r
x <- matrix(rnorm(10000), ncol = 100, nrow = 100)
print_matrix(x, rowdots = 4, coldots = 4, digits = 2, label = "what a big matrix")
#> what a big matrix : 100 x 100 matrix of doubles 
#>         [,1]  [,2] [,3] ... [,100]
#> [1,]    -0.3 -0.74 -0.1 ...   1.01
#> [2,]    1.39 -2.06 1.29 ...   -0.5
#> [3,]   -0.45 -1.57 0.43 ...   1.61
#> ...      ...   ...  ... ...    ...
#> [100,]  1.12  0.77 -1.6 ...  -0.08
```

And what about a `data.frame`?

``` r
x <- data.frame(x = rnorm(1000), y = LETTERS[1:10])
print_data.frame(x, rows = 7, digits = 0)
#>      x  y
#> 1     0 A
#> 2     1 B
#> 3     0 C
#> 4    -1 D
#> <993 rows hidden>
#>          
#> 998   0 H
#> 999   0 I
#> 1000  2 J
```

### [Simulation helpers](https://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/index.html#simulation)

Let’s simulate correlated regressor values from different marginal
distributions:

``` r
labels <- c("P", "C", "N1", "N2", "U")
n <- 100
marginals <- list(
  "P" = list(type = "poisson", lambda = 2),
  "C" = list(type = "categorical", p = c(0.3, 0.2, 0.5)),
  "N1" = list(type = "normal", mean = -1, sd = 2),
  "U" = list(type = "uniform", min = -2, max = -1)
)
correlation <- matrix(
  c(1, -0.3, -0.1, 0, 0.5,
    -0.3, 1, 0.3, -0.5, -0.7,
    -0.1, 0.3, 1, -0.3, -0.3,
    0, -0.5, -0.3, 1, 0.1,
    0.5, -0.7, -0.3, 0.1, 1),
  nrow = 5, ncol = 5
)
data <- correlated_regressors(
  labels = labels, n = n, marginals = marginals, correlation = correlation
)
head(data)
#>   P C        N1         N2         U
#> 1 3 3  0.854606 -1.1509971 -1.575507
#> 2 3 3 -3.801998  0.5696389 -1.784321
#> 3 4 3 -1.024611 -1.0414976 -1.333803
#> 4 0 3 -0.490758 -0.9806894 -1.840349
#> 5 1 3 -1.681134  0.7511786 -1.939042
#> 6 2 1 -2.814986  0.7984411 -1.367265
cor(data)
#>              P          C          N1          N2          U
#> P   1.00000000 -0.2287181 -0.08793083 -0.02476611  0.4877251
#> C  -0.22871807  1.0000000  0.28573358 -0.52539377 -0.7628656
#> N1 -0.08793083  0.2857336  1.00000000 -0.30000000 -0.2694518
#> N2 -0.02476611 -0.5253938 -0.30000000  1.00000000  0.1138354
#> U   0.48772506 -0.7628656 -0.26945184  0.11383544  1.0000000
```

### [Transformation helpers](https://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/index.html#transformation)

The
[`group_data.frame()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/group_data.frame.md)
function groups a given `data.frame` based on the values in a specified
column:

``` r
df <- data.frame("label" = c("A", "B"), "number" = 1:10)
group_data.frame(df = df, by = "label")
#> $A
#>   label number
#> 1     A      1
#> 3     A      3
#> 5     A      5
#> 7     A      7
#> 9     A      9
#> 
#> $B
#>    label number
#> 2      B      2
#> 4      B      4
#> 6      B      6
#> 8      B      8
#> 10     B     10
```

### [Validation helpers](https://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/index.html#validation)

Is my matrix a proper transition probability matrix?

``` r
matrix <- diag(4)
matrix[1, 2] <- 1
check_transition_probability_matrix(matrix)
#> [1] "Must have row sums equal to 1"
```

# Package index

### Data

These datasets are available with this package.

- [`hermann`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/hermann.md) :
  Hermannslauf

### Distribution

These functions help to work with distributions.

- [`ddirichlet_cpp()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/ddirichlet.md)
  [`rdirichlet_cpp()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/ddirichlet.md)
  [`ddirichlet()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/ddirichlet.md)
  [`rdirichlet()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/ddirichlet.md)
  : Dirichlet distribution
- [`dmixnorm_cpp()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/dmixnorm.md)
  [`pmixnorm_cpp()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/dmixnorm.md)
  [`rmixnorm_cpp()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/dmixnorm.md)
  [`dmixnorm()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/dmixnorm.md)
  [`pmixnorm()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/dmixnorm.md)
  [`rmixnorm()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/dmixnorm.md) :
  Mixture of normal distributions
- [`dmvnorm_cpp()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/dmvnorm.md)
  [`pmvnorm_cpp()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/dmvnorm.md)
  [`rmvnorm_cpp()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/dmvnorm.md)
  [`dmvnorm()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/dmvnorm.md)
  [`pmvnorm()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/dmvnorm.md)
  [`rmvnorm()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/dmvnorm.md) :
  Multivariate normal distribution
- [`dtnorm_cpp()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/dtnorm.md)
  [`dttnorm_cpp()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/dtnorm.md)
  [`rtnorm_cpp()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/dtnorm.md)
  [`rttnorm_cpp()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/dtnorm.md)
  [`dtnorm()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/dtnorm.md)
  [`dttnorm()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/dtnorm.md)
  [`rtnorm()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/dtnorm.md)
  [`rttnorm()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/dtnorm.md) :
  Truncated normal distribution
- [`dwishart_cpp()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/dwishart.md)
  [`rwishart_cpp()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/dwishart.md)
  [`dwishart()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/dwishart.md)
  [`rwishart()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/dwishart.md) :
  Wishart distribution
- [`gaussian_tv()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/gaussian_tv.md)
  : Gaussian total variation

### Functional

These functions help to work with functions.

- [`function_arguments()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/function_arguments.md)
  : Get function arguments
- [`function_body()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/function_body.md)
  : Extract function body
- [`function_defaults()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/function_defaults.md)
  : Get default function arguments
- [`quiet()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/quiet.md) : Silence
  R code
- [`try_silent()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/try_silent.md)
  : Try an expression silently
- [`variable_name()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/variable_name.md)
  : Determine variable name

### Indexing

These functions help to index objects.

- [`Dictionary`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/Dictionary.md) :
  Dictionary R6 Object

- [`Storage`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/Storage.md) :
  Storage R6 Object

- [`map_indices()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/map_indices.md)
  : Map indices

- [`match_numerics()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/match_numerics.md)
  : Best-possible match of two numeric vectors

- [`matrix_diagonal_indices()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/matrix_diagonal_indices.md)
  : Get indices of matrix diagonal

- [`matrix_indices()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/matrix_indices.md)
  :

  Get `matrix` indices

- [`permutations()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/permutations.md)
  : Build permutations

- [`subsets()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/subsets.md) :
  Generate vector subsets

- [`vector_occurrence()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/vector_occurrence.md)
  : Find the positions of first or last occurrence of unique vector
  elements

### Packaging

These functions help to build a package.

- [`find_namespace_calls()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/find_namespace_calls.md)
  : Namespace calls

- [`input_check_response()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/input_check_response.md)
  : Standardized response to input check

- [`match_arg()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/match_arg.md) :
  Argument matching

- [`occurrence_info()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/occurrence_info.md)
  : Provide information about occurrences

- [`package_logo()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/package_logo.md)
  : Creating a basic logo for an R package

- [`print_data.frame()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/print_data.frame.md)
  :

  Print (abbreviated) `data.frame`

- [`print_matrix()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/print_matrix.md)
  :

  Print (abbreviated) `matrix`

- [`unexpected_error()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/unexpected_error.md)
  : Handling of an unexpected error

### Simulation

These functions help to simulate something.

- [`Simulator`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/Simulator.md) :
  Simulator R6 Object
- [`correlated_regressors()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/correlated_regressors.md)
  : Simulate correlated regressor values
- [`do.call_timed()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/do.call_timed.md)
  : Measure computation time
- [`equidistant_vectors()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/equidistant_vectors.md)
  : Generate equidistant vectors in Euclidean space
- [`sample_correlation_matrix()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/sample_correlation_matrix.md)
  : Sample correlation matrix
- [`sample_covariance_matrix()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/sample_covariance_matrix.md)
  : Sample covariance matrix
- [`sample_transition_probability_matrix()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/sample_transition_probability_matrix.md)
  : Sample transition probability matrices
- [`simulate_markov_chain()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/simulate_markov_chain.md)
  : Simulate Markov chain
- [`timed()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/timed.md) :
  Interrupt long evaluations

### Transformation

These functions help to transform an input.

- [`chunk_vector()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/chunk_vector.md)
  : Split a vector into chunks

- [`cov_to_chol()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/cov_to_chol.md)
  [`chol_to_cov()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/cov_to_chol.md)
  [`unique_chol()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/cov_to_chol.md)
  : Cholesky root of covariance matrix

- [`delete_columns_data.frame()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/delete_columns_data.frame.md)
  :

  Deleting `data.frame` columns

- [`diff_cov()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/diff_cov.md)
  [`undiff_cov()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/diff_cov.md)
  [`delta()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/diff_cov.md)
  [`M()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/diff_cov.md) :
  Difference and un-difference covariance matrix

- [`group_data.frame()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/group_data.frame.md)
  :

  Grouping of a `data.frame`

- [`insert_matrix_column()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/insert_matrix_column.md)
  : Insert column in matrix

- [`insert_vector_entry()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/insert_vector_entry.md)
  : Insert entry in vector

- [`merge_lists()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/merge_lists.md)
  : Merge named lists

- [`round_data.frame()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/round_data.frame.md)
  :

  Round `numeric` columns of a `data.frame`

- [`split_vector_at()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/split_vector_at.md)
  : Split a vector at positions

- [`stationary_distribution()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/stationary_distribution.md)
  : Stationary distribution

### Validation

These functions help to validate an input.

- [`check_correlation_matrix()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/check_correlation_matrix.md)
  [`assert_correlation_matrix()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/check_correlation_matrix.md)
  [`test_correlation_matrix()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/check_correlation_matrix.md)
  : Check correlation matrix
- [`check_covariance_matrix()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/check_covariance_matrix.md)
  [`assert_covariance_matrix()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/check_covariance_matrix.md)
  [`test_covariance_matrix()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/check_covariance_matrix.md)
  : Check covariance matrix
- [`check_list_of_lists()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/check_list_of_lists.md)
  [`assert_list_of_lists()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/check_list_of_lists.md)
  [`test_list_of_lists()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/check_list_of_lists.md)
  : Check list of lists
- [`check_missing()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/check_missing.md)
  [`assert_missing()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/check_missing.md)
  [`test_missing()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/check_missing.md)
  : Check missing formal argument
- [`check_numeric_vector()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/check_numeric_vector.md)
  [`assert_numeric_vector()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/check_numeric_vector.md)
  [`test_numeric_vector()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/check_numeric_vector.md)
  : Check numeric vector
- [`check_one_hot_matrix()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/check_one_hot_matrix.md)
  [`assert_one_hot_matrix()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/check_one_hot_matrix.md)
  [`test_one_hot_matrix()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/check_one_hot_matrix.md)
  : Check one-hot matrix
- [`check_probability_vector()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/check_probability_vector.md)
  [`assert_probability_vector()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/check_probability_vector.md)
  [`test_probability_vector()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/check_probability_vector.md)
  : Check probability vector
- [`check_transition_probability_matrix()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/check_transition_probability_matrix.md)
  [`assert_transition_probability_matrix()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/check_transition_probability_matrix.md)
  [`test_transition_probability_matrix()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/check_transition_probability_matrix.md)
  : Check transition probability matrix
- [`identical_structure()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/identical_structure.md)
  : Check if two objects have identical structure
- [`system_information()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/system_information.md)
  : General system level information
- [`user_confirm()`](http://loelschlaeger.de/oeli/reference/user_confirm.md)
  : User confirmation
